mentions.note: Storage supply crisis making data center customers money; Cramer advises taking profits on dramatic gains rather than holding into correction.
Data storage stock more than tripled in 2025; now cooling after overheating.
Storage and data solutions; beneficiary of memory chip shortage; up 18% YTD; will continue higher as supply constraints persist.
Storage and memory chip maker benefiting from massive data center demand surge; up 25% YTD but needs massive beat-and-raise to maintain momentum. Likely to deliver.
Disc drive maker with pricing power; disciplined on supply (no market flooding); +19% today on strong guidance and shortage visibility.
Memory/storage bull market leader; #3 January performer, up 48%. Benefiting from AI-driven data center demand; part of hot sector.
Storage name flying too close to sun alongside SanDisk; extreme volatility and drawdowns.
Memory and storage maker with severe shortage; AI demand far exceeds supply; rationing product; no demand destruction risk; memory prices can rise significantly.
Storage/memory play part of trading desk signal; typically moves with semiconductor complex. Cramer uses as crawl indicator for broader tech mood.
Memory/storage play; too high now but buyable on significant pullback tied to oil shock ($120+). Memory shortage durable.
Obliterated alongside Micron on memory shortage hype; parabolic prior trend suggests correction justified. If market turns to bear, further downside likely.
Storage manufacturer up 18-57% Q1 on data center shortage; sold out but commodity player; Cramer prefers Nvidia-type real producers.
Storage/memory play rallying on data-center demand, but Cramer views memory shortage as pernicious tax on system; prefers higher-IP equipment.
Storage hardware back from dead; data center expansion.
Memory and data storage; up 51% since bottom. AI hardware buildout drives memory demand far beyond historical norms; supply constrained through 2027.
Storage and memory play; took breather today but part of data center infrastructure rally.
Memory disk drive; up 100 bps at close; benefits from compute/storage shortage driving Fourth Industrial Revolution.
Storage supplier mentioned across mega-cap earnings for component cost inflation; terrific quarter but stock overextended and parabolic—sell on strength.
EPS surged from $0.19 in FY2023 to $8.10 in FY2025, projected at $38 in FY2028; structural storage shortage gives pricing power and the stock is still galloping toward realistic elevated estimates.
Storage stock up 712% over 12 months; riding data center wave; low valuation multiples justify continued strength; pick and hold for long term.
Storage solutions company fairly valued despite semiconductor sector rally.
Commodity stock at 50x next year's earnings. Overvalued; pass.
Storage shortage beneficiary, up 287% YTD; continuous price increases on constrained supply; data center demand insatiable.
